name: agentic-wiki
description: Agentic wiki plugin for ingesting data, synthesizing structured knowledge, and enabling semantic querying across workflows.

skills.name: wiki
skills.description: Build and manage a structured knowledge system from raw inputs. Supports ingestion, synthesis, querying, cleanup, and expansion.
skills.usage: /wiki ingest | absorb [date-range] | query <question> | cleanup | breakdown | status

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Convert raw data sources into normalized markdown entries with metadata.

commands.name: absorb
commands.description: Compile entries into structured wiki articles with contextual understanding.

commands.name: query
commands.description: Answer questions by synthesizing knowledge from the wiki.

commands.name: cleanup
commands.description: Audit and improve article quality, structure, and linking.

commands.name: breakdown
commands.description: Identify missing topics and generate new articles from patterns and references.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show ingestion progress, article stats, and knowledge coverage.

principles: Synthesize meaning, not just store data
Ensure all data becomes usable knowledge
Favor depth and insight over volume
